notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho reaches on a fielder's choice. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd. Fielding error by second baseman Juan Brito.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo doubles (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Davis Schneider, deflected by center fielder Daulton Varsho. Rhys Hoskins scores. George Valera to 3rd.
